news.headline: Autonomous driving firm Autobrains eyes robotaxi growth in Europe, CEO says
news.summary: Europe is an emerging but promising market for self-driving 'robotaxis', with the technology ‌set to become far more visible across the ‌region over the next two years, the CEO of Israeli autonomous driving ​firm Autobrains said on Tuesday.  "I think 2026 and 2027 is going to be an inflection point for Europe in terms of robotaxis," Igal Raichelgauz told the Reuters Automotive Europe ‌conference in Frankfurt.  Autobrains, ⁠which is based in Tel Aviv and has an office in Munich, is developing lower-cost ⁠autonomous driving technology built around so-called agentic AI, which it says reduces reliance on expensive sensors and computing power, ​a key ​obstacle to scaling self-driving ​systems.

news.headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Teams With IBM And Red Hat On AI Cyber Threats
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks (NasdaqGS:PANW) announced a collaboration with IBM and Red Hat to address AI-driven cyber threats. The partnership focuses on open-source software and critical infrastructure environments. The companies plan to integrate virtual patching with software remediation and coordinated vulnerability response.
